current_run.description: This problem involves finding a secret cubic polynomial function on N bits. The function evaluates the parity of the product of three distinct bits, chosen based on a secret key. Specifically, f(x) = (x_i * x_j * x_k) mod 2, where i, j, k are determined by a secret integer. The goal is to identify the indices i, j, k. This is a non-linear problem beyond quadratic.
